category_sources: Official QuantLib homepage says QuantLib is a free/open-source library for modeling, trading, and risk management in real life.
source_facts.description says library for quantitative finance.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is QuantLib: a free/open-source library for quantitative finance.
source_facts.repo uses the official QuantLib repository name.
docs_sources: Official QuantLib Documentation page links to the QuantLib reference manual on the official site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/lballabio/QuantLib; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official QuantLib homepage describes a quantitative finance framework for modeling, trading, and risk management.
source_facts.description identifies it as a library for quantitative finance.
